figures.title: Dispute Resolution via Deterministic Cryptographic Arbitrator Selection
figures.mermaid_code:
%% FIG. 5 - Dispute Resolution
sequenceDiagram
    participant C as 500 - Challenger
    participant S as 502 - Dispute Resolution Module
    participant A1 as 504 - Arbitrator 1
    participant A2 as 506 - Arbitrator 2
    participant A3 as 508 - Arbitrator 3
    participant V as 510 - Original Validator
    C->>S: Initiate Dispute
    S->>S: 512 - Deterministic Cryptographic Selection (excludes challenger and validator)
    S->>A1: Selected as Arbitrator
    S->>A2: Selected as Arbitrator
    S->>A3: Selected as Arbitrator
    A1->>S: Independent Evaluation
    A2->>S: Independent Evaluation
    A3->>S: Independent Evaluation
    S->>S: 514 - Majority Vote Resolution
    S->>C: 516 - Trust Score Updated
    S->>V: 518 - Trust Score Updated
